pdf.pageNumberHint: Enter a page number and press Enter to jump

stash.emptyHint: No stashed snippets yet. Select content in the PDF and click Add to Stash.

session.emptyHint: Select content in the PDF, click Explain to generate an interpretation, or add it to Stash first and use Custom Interpret.

recentFiles.title: Recent Files
recentFiles.empty: Recently opened files will appear here

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure the LLM API, feature options, and system information.
settings.llmApiHint: Model access information used for translation, interpretation, and custom Q&A.
settings.outputLanguageHint: The default language used for translation and interpretation results.
settings.hoverTranslateHint: Show translations from the local ECDICT dictionary when hovering over English words.
settings.systemPromptsHint: Control the AI's role and style in different scenarios. Supports the {targetLanguage} placeholder.
settings.defaultPdfReaderHint: Open Windows default apps settings, find .pdf in the list and set SpecReader AI as the default.
settings.softwareUpdateHint: Current version {{version}}. Check manually for updates.
settings.installingUpdate: Downloading and installing update; the app will restart automatically…
settings.noUpdateForPlatform: No update package is available for this system
settings.downloadDictionaryHint: Hover translation requires downloading the ECDICT English-Chinese dictionary (about 200 MB). It will be saved to the local app data directory and only needs to be downloaded once.

defaultPrompts.translate: You are an assistant specializing in translating testing and certification industry standard documents. Accurately translate English standard clauses into {targetLanguage}. Keep professional terminology accurate, retain the original text when key terms first appear, and do not make up clauses or page numbers not mentioned in the excerpt.
defaultPrompts.explain: You are an assistant for reading testing and certification industry standard documents, skilled at explaining complex English standard clauses clearly. Answer in {targetLanguage} based on the document excerpt provided by the user, and do not make up clauses or page numbers not mentioned in the excerpt.

errorBoundary.title: An error occurred
errorBoundary.description: Try reloading, or open the logs directory to troubleshoot.

error.apiKeyMissing: API Key is not configured. Please configure the LLM API in Settings first.
error.streamReadError: Unable to read LLM response stream.

prompts.explain:
Explain the following standard clause/paragraph in accessible {{targetLanguage}}, describing its requirements, significance, relationship to testing work, and any potentially related clauses:

{{text}}
prompts.translate:
Translate the following standard document content into {{targetLanguage}}, keep professional terminology accurate, and retain the original text when key terms first appear:

{{text}}

tabs.maxTabsHint: You can open up to {{maxTabs}} PDF files at the same time. Please close some tabs first.

confirm.deleteExplainBody: Are you sure you want to delete this interpretation? The source marker and the interpretation record in the right panel will be deleted together.
